title: Mini Tokyo 3D
author: @nagix / Akihiko Kusanagi
description: A real-time 3D digital map of Tokyo's public transport system with live train tracking, stations, and flight data.

title: Metrogram3D
author: @nulldesign / Null Design
description: A gorgeous 3D WebGL visualization of Tokyo Metro data with colorful light-painting style train paths and glowing orbs.

title: Tokyo Night VSCode Theme
author: @tokyo-night
description: A clean, dark VS Code theme celebrating the neon lights of Downtown Tokyo at night with low-contrast UI elements.

title: Parallax Tokyo City Skyline
author: Anonymous
description: A parallax Tokyo city skyline created with pure CSS and SVG, showcasing interactive web design techniques.

title: Vibe Code Tokyo
author: Community
description: A local Tokyo community and platform offering courses on AI tools, vibe coding, no-code development, and hackathons.

title: Tokyo Project
author: @CaDs
description: A web project sharing creative visions of Tokyo through interactive visualizations and city data.

title: Metrogram (Classic)
author: @nulldesign
description: Precursor to Metrogram3D - a beautiful, more relatable visualization of Tokyo Metro with abstract light-based aesthetics.

title: Tokyo Metro 3D Model (Tokyo Arteria)
author: Takatsugu Kuriyama
description: A stunning 80cm physical 3D model of Tokyo's tangled subway system with colored tubes and liquid visualization.

title: Tokyo Metro Transit Map (Sergio Mejia)
author: Sergio Mejia
description: A clean, unofficial redesigned Tokyo Metro diagram including both Tokyo Metro and Toei Metro lines, created in Affinity Designer.

title: inat Tokyo Metro Map
author: @inat
description: A creative Tokyo Metro map with geometric simplification, centered on the Imperial Palace, available as art prints and merchandise.

title: Machine Learning Tokyo Interactive Tools
author: Machine-Learning-Tokyo
description: Open-source interactive ML visualization tools and demos developed by the Tokyo machine learning community.

title: Git City
author: @srizzon
description: A creative visualization that transforms GitHub profiles into 3D pixel art buildings in an interactive city, where contributions grow building height.

title: Tokyo Hand-Drawn Rail Map
author: Wyton Chu
description: A remarkable hand-drawn map of Japan's entire rail system including Tokyo, meticulously detailed without digital tools.

title: Le Wagon Tokyo Demo Day 2025
author: Le Wagon Tokyo
description: Showcase event featuring 48 students' final web development and data science projects, live pitches, and networking.
